curation_notes: Two-commit fix: cdf616670942fec7d09fae2452e2ea215205dd1d (PR #9694, strips URL fragment to prevent '#' bypass) and 23e3e00cae1fd120b089fca54f7440945dfe11a4 (PR #9707, adds case-insensitive stripping of sensitive params and multi-host support). Pre-patch commit is the parent of the first fix (b37b968) so the served code has the full vulnerability. Post-patch commit is the final fix. The vulnerability is in MySQLSensitiveUrlUtils.filterSensitive() which can be bypassed via URL fragment injection and case variation to pass autoDeserialize=true to the MySQL JDBC driver. No sibling files found in the util directory.
